description: Style Notelee brings a phase of glamour into the lives of the fashion aware crowd. This shirt style piece brings out your feminine side while maintaining a gallant enigma of high octane fashion. Pair it with your favourite denims to look absolutely gorgeous.Product DetailsSlate grey pleated shirt, has floral print, spread collar, full front button placket, drawstring at the midriff, long sleeves with roll-up detail and a buttoned tab and pintucks at the shoulder Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash coolDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or dry in shadeLow iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (Height 5'8" and chest 33&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
